prestazioni: VR6 3.6L (CDVC) engine: Full bolt-on turbo conversion using a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe and a Precision Turbo & Engine 46mm wastegate, paired with a Unitronic Stage 3+ ECU tune optimized for 93 octane fuel and E85 flex-fuel capability (targeting 450-500whp on pump gas, 600whp on E85).

VR6 3.6L (CDVC) cooling system: Mishimoto aluminum radiator with dual 14-inch SPAL fans, a CSF intercooler (custom core for the Teramont’s front grille), and a 10-row Setrab oil cooler with AN-10 lines routed through a custom front bumper duct.

Chassis reinforcement: 034 Motorsport subframe collars, H&R lowering springs with KW V3 coilovers (adjustable rebound and compression damping), and a Neuspeed 25mm rear sway bar to reduce body roll during aggressive cornering (critical for the Teramont’s 5,000+ lb weight).
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Works widebody kit (Teramont-specific, extending fenders by 3 inches for aggressive stance), paired with custom 22x10.5 ET25 BBS LM wheels wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/35/22 front, 295/30/22 rear).

Full carbon fiber aero package: Maxton Design front splitter (3-piece, adjustable angle), Maxton Design rear diffuser (with integrated LED light bar), and a custom carbon fiber hood with a 2-inch cowl scoop for improved airflow to the intercooler.

Interior overhaul: Recaro Sportster CS seats (retaining OEM power adjustments), a Momo Prototipo steering wheel with a NRG quick-release hub, and a full Alcantara headliner and door cards from Euro Design Werks, paired with a custom 12-inch subwoofer enclosure in the cargo area (retaining 60% of trunk space).
